clusters.summary: Analytics data unavailable for report rpt_22

explanation:
INCIDENT SUMMARY
================
Root Cause Service : reporting
Failure Type       : a service crash
Affected Services  : none

WHAT HAPPENED
-------------
The reporting service experienced a service crash. Because downstream services
depend on reporting, failures cascaded to: none.

EVIDENCE (sample log messages)
-------------------------------
  [reporting] Report rpt_39 generation failed
  [reporting] Export failed: upstream data missing
  [reporting] Report rpt_96 generation failed
  [reporting] Export failed: upstream data missing
  [reporting] Export failed: upstream data missing

RECOMMENDED REMEDIATION
------------------------
  1. Verify upstream analytics service is healthy.
  2. Retry failed report generation jobs.
  3. Check report scheduler for stuck jobs.
